choose.when: SELECT o.FUN_ID, o.FUN_NAME,o.PARENT_ID,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, (select if((count(1)=0), 'open', 'closed') from SYS_FUN where DELETED = 0 AND parent_id = o.fun_id) as state ,${userId} as USER_ID FROM SYS_FUN o where o.`FUN_ID` IN ( SELECT FUN_ID FROM SYS_FUN where FUN_ID in (select distinct f.FUN_ID from sys_role_user u, sys_role_fun f where u.role_id = f.role_id and u.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}) or parent_id = 0 and FIND_IN_SET(FUN_ID, Get_FunChild_List(o.FUN_ID)) ) AND o.DELETED = 0 AND o.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY o.SORT_NUM ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT o.FUN_ID, o.FUN_NAME,o.PARENT_ID,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, (select if((count(1)=0), 'open', 'closed') from SYS_FUN where DELETED = 0 AND parent_id = o.fun_id) as state,${userId} as USER_ID FROM SYS_FUN o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND o.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY o.SORT_NUM ASC

mapper.select: SELECT FUN_ID FROM SYS_FUN WHERE DELETED = 0 ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC

choose.when: SELECT o.FUN_ID, o.FUN_NAME,${userId} as USER_ID FROM SYS_FUN o where exists ( SELECT FUN_ID FROM SYS_FUN where （FUN_ID in (select distinct f.FUN_ID from sys_role_user u, sys_role_fun f where u.role_id = f.role_id and u.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}) or FUN_ID < 0） and FIND_IN_SET(FUN_ID, Get_FunChild_List(o.FUN_ID)) ) AND DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT FUN_ID, FUN_NAME,${userId} as USER_ID FROM SYS_FUN WHERE DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC

choose.when: SELECT o.FUN_ID, o.FUN_NAME,${userId} as USER_ID,${roleId} as ROLE_ID, (SELECT IF(COUNT(0)=1,TRUE,FALSE) FROM SYS_ROLE_FUN srf WHERE srf.ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and srf.FUN_ID=o.FUN_ID) as CHECK_STATU FROM SYS_FUN o where o.fun_id in ( SELECT FUN_ID FROM SYS_FUN where FUN_ID in (select distinct f.FUN_ID from sys_role_user u, sys_role_fun f where u.role_id = f.role_id and u.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}) or FUN_ID < 0 and FIND_IN_SET(FUN_ID, Get_FunChild_List(o.FUN_ID)) ) AND DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT sf.FUN_ID, sf.FUN_NAME,${userId} as USER_ID,${roleId} as ROLE_ID, (SELECT IF(COUNT(0)=1,TRUE,FALSE) FROM SYS_ROLE_FUN srf WHERE srf.ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and srf.FUN_ID=sf.FUN_ID) as CHECK_STATU FROM SYS_FUN sf WHERE sf.DELETED = 0 AND sf.PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY sf.SORT_NUM ASC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_fun where FUN_ID = #{funId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_fun where FUN_NAME = #{funName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND DELETED = 0
AND FUN_ID != #{funId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_FUN (FUN_ID, FUN_NAME, PARENT_ID, SORT_NUM, LEVEL_NUM, DELETED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE) VALUES (#{funId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{funName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{sortNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{deleted,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_FUN SET LEVEL_NUM = #{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE FUN_ID = #{funId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

UPDATE SYS_FUN SET LEVEL_NUM = #{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE FUN_ID = #{funId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT FUN_ID FROM SYS_ROLE_FUN s WHERE s.ROLE_ID = #{value,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND S.FUN_ID NOT IN (SELECT F.PARENT_ID FROM SYS_FUN F where DELETED=0)

choose.when: SELECT fun_id ,SIGN(FUN_ID) AS ENABLED FROM sys_role_fun srf,sys_role_user sru WHERE srf.`ROLE_ID`=sru.`ROLE_ID` AND sru.`USER_ID`= #{userId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
choose.otherwise: SELECT FUN_ID, SIGN(FUN_ID) AS ENABLED FROM SYS_FUN

mapper.select: SELECT m.fun_id funId FROM sys_fun m WHERE m.`PARENT_ID`=#{parentId} order by m.SORT_NUM asc
